title: Open Records Request – Council Member Communications with Flock Safety

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

All emails, text messages, direct messages, or written communications of any kind between Tom Lambert of the Dunwoody City Council and any employee, representative, agent, or contractor of Flock Safety, from December 1, 2025 through the date this request is received.

Please provide all responsive records in their original electronic, machine-readable format, including full metadata, headers, and any attachments.

Please do not redirect me to a transparency portal or dashboard in lieu of producing the underlying records. This request is made for non-commercial purposes, and the responsive records will be made available to the general public. If any portion of the requested records is withheld or redacted, please cite the specific statutory exemption relied upon. If there are any anticipated costs, please notify me in advance.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jason Hunyar

title: Open Records Request – Council Member Communications with Flock Safety

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

All emails, text messages, direct messages, or written communications of any kind between Lynn Deutsch and any employee, representative, agent, or contractor of Flock Safety, from December 1, 2025 through the date this request is received.

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Georgia Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

Under the Georgia Open Records Act, I am requesting copies of all vulnerabilities and security incidents disclosed by Flock Group, Inc. (dba Flock Safety), or any Contracting Government Agency (CGA) to DPS in its role as Georgia's CJIS Systems Agency, between February 1, 2025 and April 13 2026, including CGA or Contractor documentation of any remedial actions taken.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jason Hunyar

communications.subject: Freedom of Information Act Request: FOIA Apr 12 US Army
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Military service records for subject below;
Name: David C. Rigo
Branch: United States Army
DOB: Aug 29, 1950
Dates of Service: Approx 1970 to 1990

Please provide the following military service information:
1. dates of service, dates of ranks, stations, list of awards, decorations, Badges, assignments
2. Section VII CURRENT AND PREVIOUS ASSIGNMENTS form
3. copy of Bronze Star Medal award citation
4. Military Education/ training courses
5. copy of Army commendation medal
6. Section V MISCELLANEOUS Form

Historical Documentation, military history
First name: David
Last name: Rigo
DOB - 8/29/1950

I request hard copies of paperwork in the file showing this information.
Please mail hardcopies to:

MUCKROCK NEWS
263 HUNTINGTON AVE
BOSTON, MA 02115

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Eric Bradley
